<!-- Thanks for the PR! Please fill in the sections below honestly. -->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what changed and why. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] `feat` — user-visible new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — docs / README / ADR / comment only
- [ ] `refactor` — code change with no behavior change
- [ ] `perf` — performance
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `build` / `chore` — deps, CI, internal housekeeping

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Related to #45. PRs without a related issue should explain why (e.g. trivial fix). -->

## Test plan

<!-- What did you actually run? Both happy path and at least one edge case. -->

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm rs:test` passes
- [ ] Manually tested on:
  - [ ] macOS
  - [ ] Linux
  - [ ] Windows

## Docs updated

- [ ] README / in-app copy in `src/lib/copy.ts` (if user-visible)
- [ ] ADR added or updated under `docs/adr/` (if architectural change)
- [ ] CLAUDE.md updated (if codebase convention changed)
- [ ] Not applicable

## Anything reviewers should pay extra attention to

<!-- Risky bit, subtle invariant, open question. Be honest — flagging it up front is faster than someone finding it during review. -->

## Screenshots (for UI changes)

<!-- Before / after, or short screen recording. Optional but appreciated. -->
